summary: High‑quality Kevin Tobin matrix captures a solid 1990 show with standout renditions of The Last Time, Cassidy > Deal and an epic Wharf Rat.
review: The recording is a well‑balanced matrix source that most reviewers find pleasant and professional, though one notes occasional glitchy midi‑synth artifacts. Musically the concert is praised for a strong opening, a dramatic shift into the Cassidy > Deal sequence and a monster second set highlighted by an epic Wharf Rat, making it a worthwhile addition despite not being a "barn burner".

ai_rating.rationale: Three of four reviewers give 4‑5 stars and highlight excellent performance and good sound, with only one moderate criticism about the show’s focus and some synth glitches.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear and professional matrix mix; reviewers call it pleasant and crisp. One reviewer mentions "glitchy midi‑synths" that pierce the audio, but overall sound is considered good.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong opening with The Last Time, a notable gear shift into the Cassidy > Deal sequence, and an epic second‑set climax featuring Wharf Rat. One reviewer called the overall show "floppy" but most describe it as well‑played.
